title: Build Shikho Computer Class learning app (MVP)

requirements.text: Create the app shell with a coherent visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component styles) applied consistently across all pages for the “Shikho Computer Class” brand.
acceptanceCriteria: App has a consistent theme across navigation, pages, forms, and cards
Theme does not rely on a blue/purple primary palette

requirements.text: Implement a public landing page for “Shikho Computer Class” that introduces the app and provides clear calls-to-action to browse courses and sign in.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page renders at the default route
Landing includes: app name, brief description, primary buttons for “Browse Courses” and “Sign in”
Landing uses generated static images from frontend/public/assets/generated when available

requirements.text: Add Internet Identity sign-in/out UI and authenticated app state so users can access enrolled courses and track progress.
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign in and sign out using Internet Identity
UI clearly indicates signed-in vs signed-out state
Protected pages prompt sign-in when not authenticated

requirements.text: Implement backend data models and APIs to support: course catalog, lesson content, enrollments per user, and lesson completion/progress per user.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes query/update methods to: list courses, get course details (including lessons), enroll current user in a course, mark a lesson completed, and fetch current user progress
All user-specific data is keyed by the caller principal
Data persists across canister upgrades using stable storage patterns appropriate for a single-actor Motoko canister

requirements.text: Build a “Browse Courses” experience: a course list page with search/filter and a course detail page showing syllabus (lesson list) and an enroll/unenroll action (if supported).
acceptanceCriteria: Course list loads from backend and supports basic text search (client-side or server-side)
Course detail page shows title, description, and ordered lessons
Enroll action updates backend and updates UI state without full page refresh

requirements.text: Build a lesson viewer page that displays lesson content and allows the signed-in user to mark lessons as completed; show per-course progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Lesson viewer loads lesson by course+lesson identifier and renders readable content
“Mark as completed” persists to backend and updates progress indicators
Course detail shows progress (e.g., completed X of Y) for the signed-in user

requirements.text: Add a “My Learning” dashboard for signed-in users showing enrolled courses and progress, with quick navigation back to the next incomplete lesson.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard only shows after sign-in
Dashboard lists enrolled courses with progress
Each enrolled course provides a “Continue” action that routes to the next incomplete lesson when available

requirements.text: Seed the app with a small default course catalog (at least 2 courses, each with at least 5 lessons) suitable for beginner computer learning, with all user-facing text in English.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 courses exist by default without requiring admin tools
Each course has at least 5 lessons with English titles and short content
Frontend can browse and open the seeded content successfully

requirements.text: Add static image assets generated for the app to frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (logo and a landing illustration).
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filenames
Landing page renders the hero illustration
Header/nav or landing displays the logo

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths; compose them from app code instead.
Do not add third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
nonGoals: Live classes, real-time chat, or video conferencing
Admin CMS for creating/editing courses via UI

required: Minimal flat logo mark with a computer + graduation cap motif, warm colors (shikho-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Friendly isometric illustration of a student learning on a laptop with simple UI elements, warm palette (shikho-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
